title: UPI OC179 FY 23 24 Customer awareness and engagement for UPI LITE Enablement and Top up
text:
N=)

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCI/UPUOC No.179/2023-24 2-4 November 2023

To,
All Members, Unified Payments Interface (UPI)

Dear Madan/Sir,
Subject: Customer awareness and engagement for UPI LITE Enablement and Top-up

This is in reference to NPCI circular NPC] /UPI/OC No.138/2021-22, dated 16'" March 2022 with
subject ‘Introduction of “On-Device wallet” — UPI LITE for Small Value Transactions’ and
NPCI/UPI/OC No.169/2023-24, dated 31%t August 2023 with subject ‘Enhancement in UPI LITE
transaction limit to ¥500’, whereby guidelines to operationalize UPI LITE small value transactions

have been introduced.

The objective of introducing UPI LITE was to reduce the need for infrastructure scale up at bank end
to cater the growing volumes of UPI small value transactions. UPI LITE is fast and seamless, as UPI
PIN is not required to complete the transaction. In addition, UPI LITE reduces the demand of
availability of the issuer infrastructure for completing the transaction and hence provides better
success rates. To grow UPI LITE and further enhance the customer experience, UPI Apps shall carry
out the below actions:

1) For customers who have not enabled UPI LITE — UPI apps must create customer awareness
by highlighting the faster checkout experience. UPI Apps shail send a pop-up/ notification with
call to action to enable UP] LITE, when customer performs UPI transaction with PIN below
500. The notification shall be sent after the UPI transaction and there shall not be any change

in the customer experience for the UP! transaction.

2) For new UPI customer onboarding, UPI apps shall define journey for enabling UPI LITE also

~~

during UPI onboarding with consent from the user.

3) Post UPI LITE enablement, UPI LITE shall be the default instrument for transactions value
below £500.

4) Top-up notifications/ pop-up with call to action shall be given to the customer, if UPI LITE
balance goes below %200. Pop-up/ notifications shall be given in below ways:
a) Pop-up/ noiification when user opens the App and the UPI LITE balance is below 2200.
b) After UPI transaction, if UPI LITE wallet balance is below 2200 then pop-up / notification
shall be given to the customer.

JOOIA, The Capital, B Wing, 10 Floor,

Bandra Kuria Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 O51-
T: +91 22 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101
contact@npci.org.in www.npci.org.in

CIN: U74990MH2008NPL189067


Nell

aprara Perr
NATIONAL Baie Beg aa TION OF INDIA

5) UPI Apps shall make the necessary UI/ UX changes to display the notifications/ popups.
6) UPI Apps shall provide banner on homepage to enable UPI LITE.

All UPI Apps live on UPI LITE shall implement & comply to the above actions by 21** November’23.

Yours Faithfully,

SD/-
Kunal Kalawatia
Chief of Products
